condition.expression: (((NOT (LABEL_TYPE = 'S')) OR ((LABEL_TYPE = 'S') IS NULL)) AND ((NOT (LABEL_TYPE = 'C')) OR ((LABEL_TYPE = 'C') IS NULL)))

expression.expression: (CASE WHEN (((STUDY_SITE_NUMBER IS NULL) OR ((SUBSTRING( SUBJECT_ID, 1, 4)) IS NULL)) OR (STUDY_SITE_NUMBER <> (SUBSTRING( SUBJECT_ID, 1, 4)))) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
(CASE WHEN ((in0.STUDY_ID = in1.STUDY_ID) AND (in0.SUBJECT_ID = in1.SUBJECT_ID)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.STUDY_ID END)
(CASE WHEN ((in0.STUDY_ID = in1.STUDY_ID) AND (in0.SUBJECT_ID = in1.SUBJECT_ID)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.SUBJECT_ID END)

condition.expression: ((NOT (NOT (STUDY_SITE_NUMBER IS NULL))) OR ((NOT (STUDY_SITE_NUMBER IS NULL)) IS NULL))

expression.expression: CAST((CASE WHEN ((STUDY_ID = 'C4591001') AND (STUDY_SITE_NUMBER = '4444')) THEN '1231' ELSE STUDY_SITE_NUMBER END) AS string)
(CASE WHEN ((in0.STUDY_ID = in1.STUDY_ID) AND (in0.SUBJECT_ID = in1.SUBJECT_ID)) THEN in1.STUDY_SITE_NUMBER ELSE NULL END)

from gpdip_cdm.study_alias_v

expression.expression: ((coalesce(in0.STUDY_ID, in1.STUDY_ID, in2.STUDY_ID) = in3.STUDY_ID) AND (coalesce(in0.SUBJECT_ID, in1.SUBJECT_ID, in2.SUBJECT_ID) = in3.SUBJECT_ID))
(CASE WHEN ((in0.STUDY_ID = in1.STUDY_ID) AND (in0.SUBJECT_ID = in1.SUBJECT_ID)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.STUDY_ID END)

warehouseQuery.query:
select * 
from gpdip_cdm.subject_v WHERE (SUBJ_STATUS NOT IN ('DELETED')
OR SUBJ_STATUS IS NULL)
AND DELETE_FLAG = 'N'

expression.expression: (CASE WHEN ((in0.STUDY_ID = in1.STUDY_ID) AND (in0.SUBJECT_ID = in1.SUBJECT_ID)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.STUDY_ID END)
(CASE WHEN ((in0.STUDY_ID = in1.STUDY_ID) AND (in0.SUBJECT_ID = in1.SUBJECT_ID)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.SUBJECT_ID END)
((coalesce(in0.STUDY_ID, in1.STUDY_ID, in2.STUDY_ID) = in3.STUDY_ID) AND (coalesce(in0.SUBJECT_ID, in1.SUBJECT_ID, in2.SUBJECT_ID) = in3.SUBJECT_ID))
((coalesce(in0.STUDY_ID, in1.STUDY_ID, in2.STUDY_ID, in3.STUDY_ID) = in4.STUDY_ID) AND (coalesce(in0.SUBJECT_ID, in1.SUBJECT_ID, in2.SUBJECT_ID, in3.SUBJECT_ID) = in4.SUBJECT_ID))

((coalesce(in0.STUDY_ID, in1.STUDY_ID, in2.STUDY_ID, in3.STUDY_ID, in4.STUDY_ID) = in5.STUDY_ID) AND (coalesce(in0.SUBJECT_ID, in1.SUBJECT_ID, in2.SUBJECT_ID, in3.SUBJECT_ID, in4.SUBJECT_ID) = in5.SUBJECT_ID))

((coalesce(in0.STUDY_ID, in1.STUDY_ID, in2.STUDY_ID, in3.STUDY_ID, in4.STUDY_ID, in5.STUDY_ID) = in6.STUDY_ID) AND (coalesce(in0.SUBJECT_ID, in1.SUBJECT_ID, in2.SUBJECT_ID, in3.SUBJECT_ID, in4.SUBJECT_ID, in5.SUBJECT_ID) = in6.SUBJECT_ID))
(CASE WHEN ((in0.STUDY_ID = in1.STUDY_ID) AND (in0.SUBJECT_ID = in1.SUBJECT_ID)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.STUDY_ID END)
(CASE WHEN ((in0.STUDY_ID = in1.STUDY_ID) AND (in0.SUBJECT_ID = in1.SUBJECT_ID)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.SUBJECT_ID END)

CAST((CASE WHEN (ORIGINAL_SITE_NUMBER IS NOT NULL) THEN ORIGINAL_SITE_NUMBER WHEN (SITE_NUMBER_IRT IS NOT NULL) THEN SITE_NUMBER_IRT WHEN (SITE_NUMBER_EDC IS NOT NULL) THEN SITE_NUMBER_EDC ELSE NULL END) AS string)
(CASE WHEN ((in0.STUDY_ID = in1.STUDY_ID) AND (in0.SUBJECT_ID = in1.SUBJECT_ID)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.STUDY_ID END)
(CASE WHEN ((in0.STUDY_ID = in1.STUDY_ID) AND (in0.SUBJECT_ID = in1.SUBJECT_ID)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.SUBJECT_ID END)
count(CASE WHEN cast(isnull("VALUE") as boolean) THEN '' ELSE "VALUE" END)

CAST((
  CASE
    WHEN (CONTAINS((coalesce(LOWER(SUBJ_RACE), '')), LOWER('Choose One')))
      THEN 'Not Reported'
    WHEN (SUBJ_RACE = 'Naitve Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander')
      THEN 'Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander'
    WHEN (SUBJ_RACE = 'Native Hawaiian or other Pacific Islander')
      THEN 'Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander'
    WHEN (CONTAINS((coalesce(LOWER(SUBJ_RACE), '')), LOWER('Not Reported')))
      THEN 'Not Reported'
    WHEN CAST((SUBJ_RACE IS NULL) AS BOOLEAN)
      THEN 'Not Reported'
    ELSE SUBJ_RACE
  END
) AS string)

CAST((CASE WHEN (CONTAINS((coalesce(LOWER(SUBJ_ETHNICITY), '')), LOWER('Choose One'))) THEN 'Not Reported' WHEN (CONTAINS((coalesce(LOWER(SUBJ_ETHNICITY), '')), LOWER('Not Reported'))) THEN 'Not Reported' WHEN CAST((SUBJ_ETHNICITY IS NULL) AS BOOLEAN) THEN 'Not Reported' ELSE SUBJ_ETHNICITY END) AS string)

condition.expression: ((((((LENGTH(SUBJECT_ID)) = 8) AND ((NOT (STUDY_ID = 'C5041010')) OR (STUDY_ID IS NULL))) AND ((LENGTH(CAST((REGEXP_SUBSTR(SUBJECT_ID, '\\d*')) AS string))) > 0)) AND (NOT CAST(((coalesce(LOWER(SUBJECT_ID), '')) LIKE CAST((CONCAT(LOWER('0'), '%')) AS string)) AS BOOLEAN))) AND (NOT CAST(((coalesce(LOWER(SUBJECT_ID), '')) LIKE CAST((CONCAT(LOWER('999'), '%')) AS string)) AS BOOLEAN)))

expression.expression: CAST((CASE WHEN ((STUDY_ID = 'C4591001') AND (ORIGINAL_SITE_NUMBER = '4444')) THEN '1231' ELSE ORIGINAL_SITE_NUMBER END) AS string)
